name: Zircon Hub AI-directed web reference pages
prompt_family: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: structure-first design draft for review. Input image: docs/ui-and-layout/hub.png as style reference. Preserve the Zircon Hub topbar, sidebar, bottom button-state strip, dark engineering-tool palette, teal active states, compact 8px panel radius, dense data rows, and practical production UI layout. Primary review target is overall interaction structure layout: navigation, page regions, toolbar placement, card/table grids, side panels, dropdowns, modals, and state overlays. Functional-content local callouts are secondary. Do not rely on generated text accuracy; final copy and icons are authored in HTML/CSS.
draft_status: Streaming AI drafts are structure-layout direction images only. They support global layout review and local functional-content callouts, but they are not acceptance evidence. Final accepted references are HTML/CSS-exported PNGs.
draft_usage: Overall interaction structure layout drafts for review; local functional-content callouts are secondary; not acceptance evidence.

streaming_generation.fallback: Save the last streamed partial image when the final event is missing image bytes or reports an upstream error.

supplemental_design_mode_artifacts.role: Overall interaction structure layout review sheet.
Supplemental global structure and interaction-path review sheet.

acceptance_evidence.known_limit: AI drafts and design-board screenshots are not final acceptance evidence; optional cargo check may time out under concurrent Hub library compilation.

references.prompt_focus: Editor source configuration, launch controls, and launch timeline in the Hub visual system.
Build pipeline, current task, package controls, and build history using compact operational panels.
Asset catalog with search, filter controls, compact rows, badges, and stable trailing actions.
Plugin catalog with runtime/editor categories, package metadata, and Hub badge rhythm.
Cloud package metrics, deploy services, and action panel in the same dark operations style.
Team identity, repository state, reviewers, and collaboration actions with quiet dashboard density.
Learning library rows with guides, references, checklists, and consistent catalog controls.
Settings panels for toolchain, build defaults, paths, and configuration health.
New Project form, source engine choice, template rail, and ready create action.
Project Browser search, filters, all-project rows, engine version badges, and detail affordances.
Project hero cover, metadata rows, source engine status, and project actions.
Project Browser with filter dropdown open and aligned to the toolbar select trigger.
Project Browser with sort dropdown open and stable menu elevation.
Project Detail delete confirmation state with recoverable destructive-action styling.
Header source engine popup with active engine, ready fallback, and local custom source rows.
Header user menu with account, preferences, docs, and sign-out actions.
Shared empty-state panel with no matching projects and an import action.
Shared loading-state panel for long running Hub task progress.
Shared recoverable error-state panel with retry action and error tone.
